subcodes.first_line: That which in the first instance hath been and shall ever remain the prime cause of the order of the world and the progress of nations is the Most Great Peace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: آنچه در رتبه اولیه سبب نظام عالم و ترقی امم است صلح اکبر بوده و خواهد بود و
subcodes.subjects: @universal peace; world unity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @development of capacity and readiness, @call to action
